characteristics.$text: If there is no Friendly Pylon on the battlefield, place a Friendly Pylon Unit anywhere on the GROUND LEVEL of the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This Round, the Pylon is not eligible to use its Special Abilities (excluding Structure).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: At the end of the active Unit’s Activation, select one other Friendly Unit eligible to Activate in the current Phase. Immediately Activate that Unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Use before a Friendly Ground Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The active Unit’s first Close Combat Weapon used gains PRECISION (2).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The active Unit’s first Close Combat Weapon used gains PRECISION (2).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Use when an Enemy Unit enters the battlefield from Reserves via a location other than its own Entry Edge. That Unit immediately suffers HITS 3 (1).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Use after a Friendly Unit resolves a PLACE effect. That Unit immediately resolves the HEAL (2) effect.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The active Ground Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gains BUFF Range (4).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The active Unit resolves the PLACE (3) effect.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the IMPACT (3) 4+ effect.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and use the higher result to add to the Unit’s Speed characteristic.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When this Unit resolves IMPACT, each eligible model generates 1 additional IMPACT die.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When this Unit is not Activated and receives Damage, the controlling player may count this Unit as Activated in this Phase (flip its Activation Marker) to reduce the Total Damage by 2.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When this Unit is not Activated and receives Damage, the controlling player may count this Unit as Activated in this Phase (flip its Activation Marker) to reduce the Total Damage by 2.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: All Weapons of Friendly Units targeting an Enemy Unit Within 4" of this Unit’s Shade token gain PRECISION (1).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Set a Shade token Wholly Within 12" of any model in this Unit. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may set all models of this Unit in Coherency, treating the Shade token as the Leading Model. The Shade token has DISPLACEMENT.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit's Glaive Cannon Ranged weapon gains ANTI-EVADE (2).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit's Glaive Cannon gains BUFF RoA (1).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: All Weapons of Friendly Units targeting an Enemy Unit Within 4" of this Unit’s Shade token gain PRECISION (1).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Set a Shade token Wholly Within 12" of any model in this Unit. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may set all models of this Unit in Coherency, treating the Shade token as the Leading Model. The Shade token has DISPLACEMENT.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit's Glaive Cannon Ranged weapon gains ANTI-EVADE (2).

characteristics.$text: Resolve the PLACE (6) effect. Models set by this effect cannot be set up Within the Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit gains HIDDEN Status until it performs another action.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Resolve the PLACE (6) effect. Models set by this effect cannot be set up Within the Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit.

characteristics.$text: When Artanis is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the PLACE (0) effect from another Friendly Unit. That Friendly Unit is removed from the battlefield and returned to Reserves. Artanis' Activation ends.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When another Friendly Unit Within 8" is declared as the target of a Ranged Attack and this Unit is a valid target, redirect the attack to this Unit. This Unit is eligible to make an Evade Roll against the redirected attack. This Special Ability remains active until the End of the current Activation.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: After this Unit resolves a successful Charge action, it may declare a second Charge action against a different Enemy Unit, ignoring the restriction on Charging while Engaged. The Devastating Charge ability does not trigger a second time.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the IMPACT (6) 4+ effect.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Treat this Unit’s Supply characteristic as increased by 1 for Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers, completing objectives, and resolving Disengage checks.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 0, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once per Round, when a Friendly Unit Within 4" of this Pylon uses a Special Ability that costs Psionic Energy, that ability’s PE cost is reduced by 1.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once per Round, the controlling player may deploy a Ground Unit from Reserves using this Pylon base as the Entry Edge. This Unit's Activation ends.
characteristics.name: Effect
